^980Version 4.10.1^*
----------------
^98018 January 2022^*



==^960 Design ^*==

^947-^* Reverted Christmas themed music, map, cosmetics, and in-game Heads-Up Display (HUD) back to their default variants.



=^075 Staff of the Master & Master's Legacy Changes ^*=

^059Arachna^*

^256Spider Sting^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect changes (to pre-existing):
   ^274*^* Cooldown reduced from 70/50/30 seconds to 30/25/20 seconds (was previously reduced from 70/50/30 seconds to 35/25/15 seconds).

_______________________________________________

^059Deadlift^*

^256Unholy Strength^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect changes (to pre-existing):
   ^274*^* Cooldown is now reduced by 1.5 seconds (was previously reduced by 2 seconds).
   ^274*^* Strength stolen increased from 4 Strength to 8 Strength (was previously increased from 4 Strength to 10 Strength).

^947+^* Deadlift's Unholy Strength was a little too strong and frustrating to deal with when boosted by Staff of the Master. This change should alleviate some of those issues while retaining Staff of the Master's viability on Deadlift.

_______________________________________________

^059Drunken Master^*

^256Drink^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect addition (new):
   ^274*^* Max charges increased by 10.

^2563 Point Strike^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect addition (new):
   ^274*^* Time to reset all activated strike points for a target (after the effect of 3 Point Strike has been triggered already) reduced from 12 seconds to 4 seconds.

_______________________________________________

^059Master of Arms^*

^077Staff of the Master effect additions (to pre-existing):^*
^947-^* Combining Bulldozer and Cheetah together has imperfections during Master's Call, causing the bonuses to drop to 70% of their original values.
   ^274*^* Attack Speed bonus reduced from 100/150/200 to 70/105/140.
   ^274*^* Attack Damage bonus reduced from 40/50/60 to 28/35/42.

^947+^* Master of Arms' Staff of the Master effect was poorly designed and far too powerful, to the point where it was deemed necessary to pick up as his first core item.
^947+^* A large part of the poor design stemmed from gaining the full effects from both Bulldozer and Cheetah for an abnormally long duration.
^947+^* When combined with the other changes to Master of Arms, Staff of the Master is less of a "mandatory" item to get for him.

_______________________________________________



=^075 General ^*=

^539Kongor Boss Enchantment - Speed^*
^947-^* Bonus Movement Speed per charge increased from 8 to 10.

^947+^* This enchantment was barely picked up after its nerfs and after the Vitality Enchantment was introduced.



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Adrenaline^*
^947-^* Starting Attack Damage increased from 43-53 to 51-57.

^947+^* Adrenaline's starting Attack Damage was drastically lower than the average Strength Hero's starting Attack Damage.
^947+^* This change should compensate for some of the other following changes to Adrenaline.

^256Shard Blast^*
^947-^* Base Magic Damage reduced from 80/115/150/185 to 75/110/145/180.
^947-^* Duration for maintaining charges on Shard Blast (after hitting 2+ enemy heroes) reduced from 10 seconds to 7 seconds.

^256Rush^*
^947-^* Range reduced from 575/650/725/800 to 530/570/610/650.
^947-^* Movement Speed bonus when dashing through an enemy hero reduced from 16/24/32/40% to 10/12/14/16%.
^947-^* Movement Speed bonus from Rush can now stack up to 2 times (max of 20/24/28/32% Movement Speed).

^947+^* The changes to Rush makes it less effective when used as an escape mechanism.

^256Ember Shard^*
^947-^* Max pull distance reduced from 800 to 700.
^947-^* Pull speed reduced from 1600 to 1400 units per second.
   ^274*^* There is no overall change in the max amount of time in which affected enemies are pulled (they are stunned while being pulled).
^947-^* Leash distance reduced from 750 to 650.

^947+^* The changes to Ember Shard can be considered a minor buff, as you can proc the effects of Ember Shard more reliably without the need to use Rush.

^256Death's Halo^*
^947-^* Max duration reduced from 5/6/7 seconds to 4/4.5/5 seconds.
^947-^* Bonuses are now capped at 7 charges (i.e., 3 enemy heroes and yourself).
^947-^* Magic Armor per charge reduced from 1.5 to 1.
^947-^* Strength per charge reduced from 4/5/6 to 3/4/5.

^947+^* The changes to Death's Halo slightly reduces its efficacy for Adrenaline's survivability when fighting multiple heroes, which should make Adrenaline slightly easier to deal with while Death's Halo is active.
^947+^* Adrenaline was far too powerful in the hands of players skilled with him, while having relatively poor performance in the average game. These changes should address both issues and put Adrenaline in a healthy position across all skill brackets, performance-wise.

_______________________________________________

^059Amun-Ra^*

^256Path of Destruction^*
^947-^* While on the path, Amun-Ra now also gains 80 Max Movement Speed.
^947-^* While on the path, Movement Speed bonus increased from 300 to 380.
^947-^* Meteor projectile travel time reduced from 0.5 seconds to 0.4 seconds.
^947-^* Meteor impact delay reduced from 0.5 seconds to 0.4 seconds.
   ^274*^* Total delay for impact after casting the ability reduced from 1 second to 0.8 seconds.
^947-^* Now also passively grants 0.7/1.4/2.1/2.8 Health Regeneration per second.

^256Ignite^*
^947-^* Now also passively grants 0.7/1.4/2.1/2.8 Health Regeneration per second.

^256Ashes to Ashes^*
^947-^* Passive Health Regeneration per second reduced from 2/3/4/5 to 0.7/1.4/2.1/2.8.
^947-^* Non-hero enemy units now take 25% less damage from this ability.
^947-^* Amun-Ra now also gains 0.4 Attack Speed per charge from this ability (max of 8/12/16/20 bonus Attack Speed).
^947-^* Requires Hero Level 3 or higher to deal Magic Damage to neutral creeps.

^947+^* Amun-Ra now has better performance against enemy heroes (in general and in the laning phase) and is no longer a viable jungler.
^947+^* Path of Destruction's overall delay has been reduced by 20%, which should increase its accuracy just enough to be more of a reliable skill to use in combat.
^947+^* Overall, every ability now grants a small amount of Amun-Ra Health Regeneration, which allows for variations in his skill build without needing to max out Ashes to Ashes first.

_______________________________________________

^059Arachna^*
^947-^* Attack Range increased from 550 to 575.

^256Webbed Shot^*
^947-^* Mana Cost reduced from 20 to 15.

^256Spider Sting^*
^947-^* Max Health of the Spiderling increased from 4/5/6 to 5/6/7.

^947+^* Arachna's lane dominance has been partially reinforced with these small changes, as the hero tapers off due to its lack of a farming tool.

_______________________________________________

^059Calamity^*

^256Dragon's Path^*
^947-^* Magic Damage per hit increased from 20/45/65/90 to 25/50/70/95.

_______________________________________________

^059Chipper^*

^256Focus Buffer^*
^947-^* Max Shield Health for Magic Damage reduced from 125/250/375/500 to 125/225/325/425.

_______________________________________________

^059Chronos^*
^947-^* Strength growth per level increased from 1.4 to 1.5.

_______________________________________________

^059Circe^*

^256Doppelganger^*
^947-^* Illusion lifetime reduced from 15/20/25/30 seconds to 14/16/18/20 seconds.
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 11 seconds to 18/16/14/12 seconds.

^947+^* Circe's illusions were frustrating to deal with at higher levels of play. The overall uptime of the illusions have been reduced to address this issue.

Twisted Visage
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 100/80/60 seconds to 90/75/60 seconds.
^947-^* Mana Cost reduced from 100/150/200 to 100/130/160.

^947+^* In exchange, Circe gets slightly better availability on her most fun ability, Twisted Visage.

_______________________________________________

^059Deadlift^*

^256Unholy Strength^*
^947-^* Max amount of Strength stolen reduced from 100 to 80.

_______________________________________________

^059Doctor Repulsor^*

^256Ludicrous Speed^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 0.5 seconds to 1.2/0.85/0.5 seconds.

^947+^* This change should make Doctor Repulsor noticeably more vulnerable and have slightly less sustained damage in the early to mid game, without affecting his primary combos at those phases of the game.

_______________________________________________

^059Electrician^*
^947-^* Intelligence gain per level increased from 1.5 to 1.8.

_______________________________________________

^059Emerald Warden^*

^256Hunter's Command^*
^947-^* Damage multiplier when hitting enemy heroes that you do not have vision of increased from 0.5x to 0.75x.

_______________________________________________

^059Empath^*
^947-^* Base Agility reduced from 20 to 18.

_______________________________________________

^059Flux^*
^947-^* Base Intelligence increased from 16 to 18.

_______________________________________________

^059Glacius^*
^947-^* Strength growth per level increased from 1.5 to 1.6.
^947-^* Agility growth per level increased from 1.5 to 1.6.
^947-^* Base Movement Speed increased from 285 to 290.

^256Tundra Blast^*
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 15 seconds to 15/14/13/12 seconds.

_______________________________________________

^059Magebane^*
^947-^* Strength gain per level reduced from 2.6 to 2.5.
^947-^* Base Strength reduced from 22 to 21.

^256Flash of Anti-Magic^*
^947-^* Mana Cost increased from 60 to 65.
^947-^* Magic Damage Shield Health reduced from 40/70/100/130 to 30/55/80/105.
^947-^* Magic Damage reduced from 40/70/100/130 to 30/55/80/105.
^947-^* Magic Damage to enemies in the area now only triggers if the shield breaks from receiving Magic Damage (instead of being applied upon reaching your target destination).
   ^274*^* This Magic Damage instance will not be triggered if the shield expires normally (i.e., when its state lifetime expires).
^947-^* Movement Speed Slow reduced from 20/25/30/35% to 15/20/25/30%.
^947-^* Radius reduced from 400 units to 350 units.

^256Master of the Mantra^*
^947-^* Attack Speed bonus granted to Magebane when attacking an enemy hero reduced from 20/30/40/50 to 16/24/32/40.

^256Mana Rift^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 100/85/70 seconds to 105/90/75 seconds.

^947+^* Magebane is powerful in lane and is deliberately intended to be that way to retain his threat level against mages at the point where they are the most powerful.
^947+^* However, his early game power has been toned down a bit for his opponents to have more reasonable timings regarding counterplay.
^947+^* Most notably, he has lost a large amount of last-hit power and extra harass damage (as well as a bit of overall farm speed in mid-game) through the nerfs on Flash of Anti-Magic, as the anti-magic shield must be broken for it to deal damage around him.

_______________________________________________

^059Master of Arms^*
^947-^* Base Intelligence increased from 14 to 16.

^256Weapon Enhancement^*
^947-^* Bulldozer: Attack Range bonus rescaled from 150 to 90/105/120/135/150.

^256Master's Call^*
^947-^* Cast action time reduced from 0.2 seconds to 0.1 seconds.
^947-^* Buff duration for the Attack Speed/Attack Damage bonus on self reduced from 25 seconds to 14 seconds.
^947-^* Now also grants Master of Arms 60/90/120 tapering bonus Movement Speed for the first 6 seconds.

^947+^* Master of Arms will now have better overall performance in the mid-game and late-game without Staff of the Master, while having slightly less Attack Range with his Bulldozer gun in the early game.
^947+^* The ridiculously high buff duration of Master's Call has also been reduced to a reasonable duration.

_______________________________________________

^059Ophelia^*

^256Command^*
^947-^* Creeps affected by Command now also gain 0.5/1/1.5/2 Mana Regeneration per second and 25/50/75/100 Max Mana.

^947+^* This change will allow Ophelia players to not always have to pick up Ring of Sorcery in every single game, allowing her more potential build options.
^947+^* Note that Ophelia can passively boost the Mana Regeneration of her creeps even further with auras like Ring of the Teacher, or by dominating Catman Champion to make use of its Mana Regeneration aura.

_______________________________________________

^059Prophet^*

^256Debilitate^*
^947-^* Tapering Movement Speed Slow magnitude reduced from 30% to 20%.

_______________________________________________

^059Puppet Master^*

^256Voodoo Puppet^*
^947-^* After becoming unkillable, increased Voodoo Puppet's lifetime from 1.5/2/2.5 seconds to 1.5/2.25/3 seconds.

_______________________________________________

^059Sand Wraith^*

^256Mirage^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 125/115/105 seconds to 130/120/110 seconds.

_______________________________________________

^059Silhouette^*
^947-^* Base Strength increased from 15 to 16.

_______________________________________________

^059Thunderbringer^*

^256Blast of Lightning^*
^947-^* Reveal effect from this ability: reveal radius that reveals enemy Wards now only has a radius of 450 units (from 900 units).
   ^274*^* Still grants vision in a large area and reveals other stealthed enemy units.

^256Lightning Storm^*
^947-^* Reveal effect from this ability no longer reveals enemy Wards.
   ^274*^* Still grants vision in a large area and reveals other stealthed enemy units.

^947+^* Thunderbringer's counterwarding utility yielded too high of a reward for little to no risk.
^947+^* Reducing the radius drastically increases the precision requirements if the player wishes to counterward.
^947+^* Overall, significantly more time will have to be spent to check a larger area for wards with Blast of Lightning, should the player wish to be thorough.

_______________________________________________

^059Torturer^*

^256Agonizing Bonds^*
^947-^* Magic Damage changed from 65/130/195/260 to 80/140/200/260.

^256Torment^*
^947-^* Using a non-ultimate ability grants Torturer 4/7/10 Health Regeneration per second for 4 seconds.
   ^274*^* This effect does not stack additively, but using non-ultimate abilities will refresh the duration of the Health Regeneration bonus.

^947+^* Torturer does not have any form of sustain built into his kit. Leveling Torment will now grant him a tiny bit of Health Sustain to help with this issue.

_______________________________________________

^059Tremble^*

^256Terrorform^*
^947-^* Terror Mound's level 3 cast range increased from 5000 units to 7000 units.

_______________________________________________

^059Voodoo Jester^*
^947-^* Starting Attack Damage changed from 51-61 to 51-59.

_______________________________________________



=^075 Items ^*=

=^075 Wingbow-related Changes ^*=

^077Faux Bow^*
^947-^* Recipe cost reduced from 550 Gold to 250 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total cost reduced from 2200 Gold to 1900 Gold.
   ^274*^* Note that this reduces Wingbow's total cost by 300 Gold as well.
^947-^* Now grants Melee heroes 50 Attack Range.

^077Savage Mace^*
^947-^* Chance to gain True Strike reduced from 100% to 80%.
   ^274*^* Chance to proc other effects remain unchanged, at 40%.

^077Wingbow^*
^947-^* Agility bonus increased from 32 to 33.
^947-^* Melee heroes now also gain an additional 5 Agility (for a total of 38 Agility) and 75 Attack Range.
   ^274*^* Total Cost reduced from 6200 Gold to 5900 Gold, based on Faux Bow's cost change.

^947+^* These changes make Wingbow more viable on melee heroes, and retains some usefulness of bonus Evasion even against Savage Mace.



=^075 Other Item Changes ^*=

^077Codex^*
^947-^* Magic Damage for level 1 Codex increased from 330 to 350.

^947+^* Heroes that commonly pick up this item are at a much more balanced performance now due to changes made for those heroes. As a result, Codex's level 1 damage value can be reverted.

^077Genjuro^*
^947-^* Attack Damage bonus reduced from 35 to 30.
^947-^* Attack Speed bonus reduced from 20 to 10.

^947+^* Genjuro was already giving a lot of value through its upgraded active ability from Assassin's Shroud. Some of its "free" stat bonuses have been toned down slightly because of this.
^947+^* Its pickup rate should now be more comparable to that of Wingbow.

^077Ghost Marchers^*
^947-^* State duration for the bonus Movement Speed increased from 3 seconds to 3.5 seconds.

^077Helm of the Black Legion^*
^947-^* Max Health bonus reduced from 270 to 250.
^947-^* Block chance reduced from 60% to 50%.

^077Ultor's Heavy Helm^*
^947-^* Max Health bonus reduced from 300 to 275.
^947-^* Block amount reduced from 80 to 70 (if the wielder of the item is a melee hero).

^947+^* Ultor's Heavy Helm's was a little too effective after its previous buffs, so its block amount and Max Health bonus have been slightly reduced.





==^960 Bug Fixes & Optimizations ^*==

=^075 General ^*=

The following sources of Armor Reduction and Magic Armor Reduction will no longer apply to boss units:
^947-^* Blacksmith's Flaming Hammer
^947-^* Hellbringer's Evil Presence
^947-^* Myrmidon's Wave Form
^947-^* King Klout's Conscription
^947-^* Revenant's Mortification
^947-^* Tremble's Impalers (and the controllable Shudder's Impalers)
^947-^* Armor of the Mad Mage
^947-^* Harkon's Blade
^947-^* Shieldbreaker



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Amun-Ra^*
^947-^* Ignite now deals the proper amount of damage upon respawning from Pyroclasmic Rebirth.

^059Blood Hunter^*
^947-^* Reduced the volume of Hemorrhage's initial hissing sound.

^059Bubbles^*
^947-^* Take Cover will no longer trigger when Bubbles damages himself (e.g., with Blood Chalice).

^059Ellonia^*
^947-^* Absolute Zero's trail visual effect is now correct for the Frostshard Ellonia avatar.

^059Goldenveil^*
^947-^* Stun state from Plunge is now correctly treated as a Status Disable (instead of a Status Debuff) to be consistent with other stun states.

^059Magebane^*
^947-^* Mana Combustion now properly displays its visual mana trail effects when burning an enemy unit's mana (similar to Nullfire Blade's visual effects, but with thinner mana trails).

^059Myrmidon^*
^947-^* Wave Form's detrimental states applied to enemy units are now properly treated as Status Debuffs.



=^075 Items ^*=

^077Insanitarius^*
^947-^* Now toggles off automatically upon death. This resolves a health quantity issue when interacting with Amun-Ra's Pyroclasmic Rebirth and Token of Life.

^077Plated Greaves^*
^947-^* Activation will no longer interrupt channeling for self.

^980Version 4.10.0.1^*
----------------
^98016 December 2021^*



==^960 Design ^*==



=^075 Staff of the Master & Master's Legacy Changes ^*=

^059Soulstealer^*

^256Soulsteal^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect change (to pre-existing):
   ^274*^* Cast Speed bonus is now 50 (instead of 70).
   ^274*^* Max number of souls is now 20/30/40/50 (instead of 25/35/45/55).

^947+^* Soulstealer was doing a little too much damage with Soul Burst while having Staff of the Master, with not enough room for reasonable counterplay.
^947+^* Reducing the max damage dealt by Soul Burst with Staff of the Master through Soulsteal and slightly reducing the Cast Speed bonus will ease these issues, while still making Staff of the Master be a strong pickup/boost on Soulstealer.

_______________________________________________



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Fayde^*

^256Burning Shadows^*
^947-^* Stun duration reduced from 1.6/2/2.4/2.8 seconds to 1.6/1.9/2.2/2.5 seconds.

^256Reflection^*
^947-^* Magic Damage dealt based on the target's current Health reduced from 10/17/24% to 10/15/20%.

_______________________________________________

^059Magebane^*
^947-^* Base Strength increased from 21 to 22.
^947-^* Strength growth per level increased from 2.4 to 2.6.
^947-^* Base Agility increased from 16 to 18.
^947-^* Agility growth per level increased from 1.4 to 1.6.
^947-^* Base Intelligence increased from 16 to 18.
^947-^* Intelligence growth per level increased from 1.5 to 2.
^947-^* Base Armor increased from 1.8 to 2.5.

^256Flash of Anti-Magic^*
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 12 seconds to 10 seconds.
^947-^* Cast Range increased from 500/600/700/800 to 600/700/800/900.
^947-^* Mana cost reduced from 75/70/65/60 to 60.
^947-^* Damage changed from 30/60/90/120 Physical Damage to 40/70/100/130 Magic Damage.
^947-^* Magic Damage Shield health increased from 30/60/90/120 to 40/70/100/130.
^947-^* Radius increased from 350 units to 400 units.
^947-^* Movement Speed Slow increased from 15/20/25/30% to 20/25/30/35%.
^947-^* Movement Speed Slow duration increased from 2 seconds to 2.5 seconds.
^947-^* Now also triggers the Attack Speed and ally Magic Damage Reduction effects of Master of the Mantra (if it is leveled) if an enemy hero is within the destination's radius of this ability.

^256Master of the Mantra^*
^947-^* Now only requires 1 attack against enemy heroes to grant Magebane all of its passive benefits (Attack Speed and ally Magic Damage Resistance), instead of 2/3/4/5 attacks.
^947-^* Mana Cost for the active ability reduced from 65/80/95/110 to 45/60/75/90.
^947-^* Mana Flare and Master of the Mantra aura radius increased from 900 units to 1200 units.

^256Mana Rift^*
^947-^* Magic Damage increased from 80/110/140% to 90/120/150% of the main target's missing Mana.

^947+^* Magebane felt a little sluggish and underwhelming at a few specific phases of the game.
^947+^* Through some mechanical changes and number changes, these areas have been smoothened out. Magebane should now be able to do what he is intended to do at each phase of the game, while still ensuring his late-game has reasonable counterplay.
^947+^* All of Magebane's abilities are now pseudo-1-point-wonders, and it is actually optimal to max Master of the Mantra first in most situations.
^947+^* The player still has full flexibility on which ability to max first, though it is strongly suggested to have at least 1 point in each of his non-ultimate abilities by level 4.

_______________________________________________

^059Nitro^*
^947-^* Starting Attack Damage reduced from 46-53 to 45-50.

^256Overdrive^*
^947-^* Initial Attack Speed bonus reduced from 200 to 100.

_______________________________________________

^059Pandamonium^*

^256Face Smash^*
^947-^* Cast Range increased from 100 to 150.

_______________________________________________

^059Parallax^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 550 to 525.
^947-^* Strength gain per level reduced from 1.9 to 1.7.

_______________________________________________

^059Sapphire^*

^256Quickshield^*
^947-^* Attack Speed bonus reduced from 20/35/50/65 to 15/30/45/60.
^947-^* After the shield health reaches 0, the persisting Attack Speed buff is halved.

_______________________________________________

^059Wildsoul^*

^256Bear Form^*
^947-^* Mana Cost for toggling the ability on reduced from 20 to 5.

_______________________________________________



==^960 Bug Fixes & Optimizations ^*==

=^075 General ^*=

User Interface ("New"):
^947-^* Mid Wars mode selection menu now shows 3 options by default (instead of 2), thus no longer requiring the user to hover over the mode selection menu to view all 3 game options.

The following sources of stun states can no longer have their duration reduced by Stun Duration Reduction sources:
^947-^* Andromeda's Void Rip
^947-^* Chipper's Rocket Barrage
^947-^* Flint Beastwood's Hollowpoint Shells
^947-^* Flint Beastwood's Money Shot
^947-^* Glacius' Ice Imprisonment
^947-^* Swiftblade's Swift Slashes
^947-^* Pharaoh's Hellfire
^947-^* Plague Rider's Plague Carrier
^947-^* Savage Mace
   ^274*^* These changes allow these stun sources to cancel channels on enemy heroes (e.g. Homecoming Stone) in the niche scenarios if they have enouigh Stun Duration Reduction from various sources (e.g. Shaman's Headdress, Barrier Idol, etc.).
   ^274*^* Note that this list isn't all-inclusive, and more may be added to this patch & future patches without being listed, as these types of changes do not impact gameplay other than the niche scenarios mentioned above.



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Bombardier^*
^947-^* Using Sticky Bomb's second activation will no longer interrupt Bombardier's current orders.

^059Gunblade^*
^947-^* Lethal Range now uses Gunblade's correct Attack Range for its range-based calculations when Faux Bow or Wingbow are in his inventory.

^059Moira^*
^947-^* Ephemeral Forge's lifetime will no longer be temporarily frozen by Arcane Vortex.
   ^274*^* This prevents a lifetime and channel time desync bug with Ephemeral Forge.

^059Kinesis^*
^947-^* Telekinetic Control now interacts properly with spell block sources (e.g. Null Stone) and ability cast detection sources (e.g. Mana Battery) for all alternate avatars.

^980Version 4.10.0^*

^9802 December 2021^*



==^960 HoNmas (Christmas) Updates ^*==



=^075 Community Events ^*=

Heroes of Newerth celebrates its 11th HoNmas with its players!
   ^274*^* Note that all of the listed community events below are for the NAEU/International Client only. Other regional clients may have their own events running.

^947-^* Earn prizes by logging in & playing HoN!
^947-^* HoNmas events will take place from December 2, 2021 (8am EST) to January 8, 2022 (11:59am EST).

^947+^* More information can be found on our official forums: https://forums.heroesofnewerth.com/index.php?/forum/49-community-events/
^947+^* Further updates will also be shown in-game via the Message of the Day (MotD) panels.



=^075 Cosmetic Updates ^*=

^947-^* The in-game Heads-Up Display (HUD) has been winterized in the spirit of Christmas! Enjoy the holidays in 2021 in Newerth!
   ^274*^* Note: only applies for the Razor and Classic HUD styles.
^947-^* The Forests of Caldavar ("New") and Mid Wars maps have also been winterized with snow, glaciers, festive decorations and presents!
^947-^* Christmas-themed music tracks & songs have returned to Newerth!
^947-^* Kongor also dressed up in the spirit of HoNmas!
   ^274*^* Unfortunately, Hellbourne Kongor on the "New" Forests of Caldavar Map is too cranky to do that - only the Legion Kongor has changed his outfit!
^947-^* Runes have also been updated to their Christmas variants!

^077New loading screens have also arrived in Newerth!^*



==^960 New Content ^*==

^077New Ellonia Avatar: Frostshard Ellonia^*
^947-^* Frostshard Ellonia will have their vengeance on those who did them wrong in Newerth!

^077New Tremble Avatar: Throwback Tremble^*
^947-^* Relive Tremble's earliest moments in Newerth with this throwback avatar!



==^960 Design ^*==



=^075 Hero Reworks ^*=

^059Magebane (Reworked)^*
^947-^* Primary attribute changed from Agility to Strength.
^947-^* Base Strength increased from 16 to 21.
   ^274*^* Starting Attack Damage remains the same (48-52).
^947-^* Strength growth increased from 1.8 to 2.4.
^947-^* Agility growth reduced from 3.1 to 1.4.
^947-^* Base Agility reduced from 25 to 16.
^947-^* Base Intelligence increased from 15 to 17.
^947-^* Intelligence gain per level increased from 1 to 1.5.
^947-^* Base Attack Time increased from 1.45 to 1.6.
^947-^* Base Movement Speed reduced from 315 to 310.
^947-^* Starting Armor increased from 1.5 to 1.8.
^947-^* Model size increased by 15%.

^256Mana Combustion^*
^947-^* Now applies 0.33x of its effects if the target is Magic Immune.

^256Flash of Anti-Magic (Reworked)^*
   ^274*^* Range: 500/600/700/800
   ^274*^* Mana Cost: 75/70/65/60
   ^274*^* Radius: 350
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 12 seconds

^947-^* Target a location to teleport there, applying a 15/20/25/30% Movement Speed Slow for 2 seconds to enemy units within radius and dealing 30/60/90/120 Physical Damage to them.
^947-^* If an enemy hero is within radius, the cooldown of this ability is reduced by 4 seconds, and you gain a 30/60/90/120 post-damage-mitigation shield that absorbs 50% of incoming Magic Damage for 7 seconds.

^947+^* These changes allows Magebane to be mobile in offensive scenarios if he is actively engaging with his foes, while reducing the frequency of using Flash outside of actual combat.
^947+^* These changes also take the focus off of Magebane's flash-farming capabilities and encourages him to participate in teamfights and ganks early on.
^947+^* Although the listed shield values are low, it is deceptively strong against Magic Damage in actual combat, due to how it stacks with Magic Armor and Master of the Mantra's Magic Damage reduction.

^075Ability 3: Master of the Mantra (Reworked)^*
^947-^* Passively grants Magebane 10/15/20/25% Magic Damage Reduction.
^947-^* Attacking an enemy hero adds 1 charge to this ability for 7 seconds. Max of 2/3/4/5 charges.
^947-^* Each charge grants 10 Attack Speed to Magebane, and grants 3% Magic Damage reduction to other ally player-controlled units within 900 radius.
   ^274*^* Note that the Magic Damage reduction from this ability stacks multiplicatively with other sources of Magic Damage mitigation, like Magic Armor.

^947-^* Activate to apply Mantra of Anti-Magic on Magebane for 10 seconds. While active, fires a Mana Flare at an enemy hero if they use an ability within 900 radius of Magebane, dealing Magic Damage equal to 30/50/70/90% of an ability's Mana Cost to them.
   ^274*^* This effect now has appropriate visual effects to indicate that a player took damage from this ability. In the past, this ability had no visual feedback, which resulted in nobody noticing how effective this effect was or when you actually took damage from this effect.
   ^274*^* Mana Cost: 65/80/95/110
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 35 seconds


^256Mana Rift^*
^947-^* Magic Damage reduced from 100/130/160% to 80/110/140% of the main target's missing Mana.
^947-^* Mana Cost reduced from 120/200/275 to 100/160/220.
^947-^* Cooldown changed from 120/100/80 seconds to 100/85/70 seconds.

^947+^* Magebane's design has been flawed from its conception, even from its WC3 DotA days. He had a contradictory role of being a flash-farmer and fragile early-game carry. In the late game, he has ridiculous amounts of mobility and high damage reduction against both Physical Damage (due to his former Agility primary attribute) and against Magic Damage, and did not actually counter mages at their strongest phase (early game). His playstyle was also generally linear for optimal play, as he had to farm Runed Cleaver and flashfarm to have any hopes of winning the game. This led to high levels of frustration for your ally team (because he is typically useless in the early to mid game and causes your team to fight 4v5 early on) and for the enemy team (late-game when reaching critical mass, there is no realistic counterplay to him because he has too much mobility, overall survivability, and insane damage output with high split push power).
^947+^* In fact, Magebane's analog (Anti-Mage) is one of the most frustrating heroes to play against and play with on your team in Dota 2.


^947+^* After shifting Magebane's primary attribute to Strength and reworking 2 of his abilities, he has now become a vanguard/frontliner for his team against Magic Damage and giving him some actual presence in the early to mid game (at the expense of having a weaker late-game scaling).
^947+^* Master of the Mantra's changes in the Magic Damage mitigation mechanics allows Magebane to properly protect against Magic Damage and Spellshards' Magic Armor Penetration effect, as well as purchase Magic Armor for himself if he requires even more protection from Magic Damage.
^947+^* Magebane is encouraged to be proactive to benefit his team due to how Master of the Mantra gains charges. Pair Magebane up with another initiator and your team will have great protection against Magic Damage if your opponents choose to engage!
^947+^* In the laning phase, you can actually use Flash and Mana Combustion to effectively harass enemy laners and trade efficiently, unlike before where you risk dying.
^947+^* Magebane is intended to be drafted against teams with heavy bursts of Magic Damage. He punishes enemy heroes with high Max Mana and cast spells with high Mana Costs.
^947+^* It should now be less frustrating to deal with Magebane, as he has now been given a weakness in the form of low Armor. His Flash has overall lower range and only has a low cooldown if you use it offensively, so chasing Magebane will also be much easier compared to before.

^947+^* Overall, Magebane's design flaws and frustrations have been resolved for all players, he's still fun to play, and he has a good level of contribution to the team for all phases of the game.
^947+^* The overall feel when playing the hero remains largely the same, but his overall playstyle has been changed.

=^075 Forests of Caldavar ^*=

^947-^* Tower Bounty for the killer changed from 460/510/560/610 to 380/460/560/610.
^947-^* Tower Bounty for other teammates changed from 150/200/300/350 to 200/250/300/350.
   ^274*^* Total Gold given across the team changed from 1060/1310/1760/2010 to 1180/1460/1760/2010.
^947-^* Tower Bounty consolation for pllayers on the team of the killer (when the Legion/Hellbourne faction gets the kill) changed from 265 to 285 for level 1 Towers.
   ^274*^* Total Gold given across the team in this manner increased from 1325 to 1425 for level 1 Towers.

^947+^* These changes reduce the gold bounty difference between the solo killer and their teammates, and generally increase the overall amount of gold a team gains when killing a tower.
^947+^* Credits to w3wstarboy for the suggestion!



=^075 Mid Wars ^*=

^947-^* Rune spawn location has been moved to be more equidistant between the Legion-side cliff and the Hellbourne-side cliff.



=^075 Structures ^*=

^075Towers^*
^947-^* Armor Penetration changed from 25% to 20%/35%/50%.

^075Well/Tarpit^*
^947-^* Attack Range increased from 800 to 1000.
^947-^* Attack Damage reduced from 200 to 175.
^947-^* Attacks now have 50% Armor Penetration.

Store at the Main Base
^947-^* Radius in which you can purchase items increased from 500 to 600.

^947+^* Towers and the Well/Tarpit attack structures are now a little more lethal to enemies as they gain Armor.
^947+^* In general, the Well/Tarpit lacked a little bit of attack range. Players should now feel slightly safer within their Well/Tarpit area.
^947+^* The store item purchase radius was not covering the staircase to the well, so this small quality-of-life change should make purchasing items at the base more consistent.



=^075 General ^*=

Camera Distance
^947-^* The in-game default and max camera distances (i.e., zoom level) have been increased by approximately 7%.

^539Kongor Boss Enchantment - Stats^*
^947-^* Renamed to "Kongor Boss Enchantment - Vitality"
^947-^* Grants a bonus 100 Max Health per charge.
^947-^* Grants a bonus 50 Max Mana per charge.
^947-^* Grants a bonus 2% Healing Received per charge.
^947-^* Grants 2 Health Regeneration (per second) per charge.
^947-^* Grants 0.6 Mana Regeneration (per second) per charge.

^539Kongor Boss Enchantment - Speed^*
^947-^* Bonus Movement Speed per charge reduced from 12 to 8.

^947+^* For the Kongor permanent buff rewards, nobody took the stats bonus and almost everyone took the Speed bonus (because most sources of Movement Speed from items do not stack).
^947+^* To resolve these issues and also introduce more survivability options in the game, the stat bonus was changed to a vitality-based bonus (as the stat bonus was chosen for the +4 Strength bonus anyway, which translated to 76 Max Health).
^947+^* The Vitality boss enchantment allows for an option to increase your hero's survivability and helps with Health and Mana sustain.

Lane Creeps
^947-^* Ranged lane creeps (including ranged siege creeps) will now have True Strike when attacking enemy lane creeps.

^947+^* This change was done to improve the consistency of last-hitting creeps, particularly in the laning phase in middle lane when ranged creeps are attacking uphill.

^075Single Draft^*
^947-^* Picking phase duration increased from 60 seconds to 70 seconds.

^256Root^*
^947-^* If state is dispelled before it expires naturally, then its current duration is reduced by 80% and becomes unpurgeable.

^947+^* Keeper of the Forest's defensive play patterns for structures was a little too frustrating to play against, so its bonuses have been reduced on ally structures.
^947+^* To compensate for this, he gains more offensive power on Nature's Guidance when rooting an enemy unit.
^947+^* Similar to the changes for Jeraziah, Keeper of the Forest is being hard-countered by heroes with purges (particularly Monarch because of her large AoE purge). By making the effect less binary upon being dispelled, Keeper of the Forest's Root ability will still partially retain its effectiveness when purged.

=^075 Items ^*=



=^075 Faux Bow and Wingbow Changes ^*=

^077Faux Bow (Reworked)^*
^947-^* Components: Alacrity Band (1200) + Fleetfeet (450) + Recipe (550) = 2200 Gold Total
^947-^* Grants: 30 Attack Speed, 6 Agility, +4 Attack Damage
^947-^* Passively grants 100 Attack Range for ranged heroes.
   ^274*^* Does not stack with Wingbow.
^947-^* Faux Bow does not have an active ability anymore.

^077Snake Bracelet^*
^947-^* Cost reduced from 1100 Gold to 1000 Gold.
^947-^* Passive Evasion chance reduced from 25% to 15%.

^947+^* Snake Bracelet was offering too much mitigation against autoattacks for its price point.

^077Wingbow^*
^947-^* Component buildup changed to: Dancing Blade (3000) + Faux Bow (2200) + Snake Bracelet (1000) = 6200 Gold Total
   ^274*^* Total Cost increased from 5700 Gold to 6200 Gold.
^947-^* Agility bonus increased from 30 to 32.
^947-^* Evasion mechanics changed:
   ^274*^* For Melee heroes who wield the item: 35%
   ^274*^* For Ranged heroes who wield the item: 20%
^947-^* Passive Attack Range bonus for ranged heroes increased from 100 to 150.
   ^274*^* Does not stack with Faux Bow.
^947-^* Passive Movement Speed bonus for melee heroes increased from 20 to 25.

^947+^* Faux Bow's original concept was flawed from its inception.
^947+^* By making it grant bonus Attack Range early and making it upgrade to Wingbow, it opens up more item options and build paths for agility heroes.
^947+^* To make Wingbow's benefits less polarizing when comparing melee to ranged heroes, Wingbow now grants more Evasion to melee heroes compared to ranged heroes.



=^075 Savage Mace and Riftshards Changes ^*=

^077Halberd (New)^*
^947-^* This item has returned to Newerth!
^947-^* Cost: 1000 Gold
^947-^* On attack impact, has a 30% chance to gain True Strike and deal 60 Physical Damage.
   ^274*^* Does not stack with Savage Mace.

^077Riftshards^*
^947-^* Component buildup changed to: Broadsword (1200) + Broadsword (1200) + Recipe (925) = 3325 Gold Total for level 1 of the item
   ^274*^* Total Cost increased from 2625/3550/4475/5400 Gold to 3325/4250/5175/6100 Gold.
^947-^* Critical Strike proc chance increased from 20% to 25%.

^077Savage Mace^*
^947-^* Component buildup changed to: Slayer (2200) + Halberd (1000) + Recipe (1100) = 4300 Gold Total
   ^274*^* Total Cost reduced from 4800 Gold to 4300 Gold.
^947-^* Physical Damage dealt upon proccing reduced from 140 to 120.
^947-^* Proc chance increased from 33% to 40%.
^947-^* Attack Damage bonus reduced from 64 to 55.
^947-^* Proc effects do not stack with Halberd.
   ^274*^* True Strike chance remains at 100%.

^947+^* Savage Mace has been underperforming in comparison to Riftshards.
^947+^* The buildup change and overall cost reduction should enable it to be picked up more, particularly since Wingbow is receiving a change as well.
^947+^* Overall damage gained per gold spent has been slightly improved compared to before.
^947+^* Riftshards in particular was also a little too powerful for its ease of buildup, so its cost was increased according to its power level.

_______________________________________________



=^075 Brand-type Item Changes ^*=

^077Dawnbringer^*
^947-^* Strength bonus reduced from 18 to 16.
^947-^* Agility bonus reduced from 18 to 16.
^947-^* Intelligence bonus reduced from 18 to 16.
^947-^* Attack Damage bonus reduced from 15 to 12.
^947-^* Attack Speed bonus reduced from 25 to 20.
^947-^* Passive Movement Speed bonus reduced from 12% to 10%.

^947+^* Dawnbringer's passive attribute bonuses were reduced to be the sum of its parts. Only its brand-specific benefits now have a minor bonus when upgrading to Dawnbringer.

^077Frostwolf's Skull^*
^947-^* Attack Damage bonus increased from 10 to 15.

^077Geometer's Bane^*
^947-^* Recipe Cost reduced from 900 Gold to 700 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total Cost reduced from 5200 Gold to 5000 Gold.
^947-^* Passive Movement Speed bonus increased from 10% to 12%.
^947-^* Attack Speed bonus increased from 15 to 25.
^947-^* Illusion lifetime reduced from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 70 seconds to 60 seconds.

^947+^* Geometer's Bane illusions have a lower lifetime in exchange for a slightly lower cooldown.

^077Grimoire of Power^*
^947-^* Intelligence bonus increased from 26 to 30.
^947-^* Mana Regeneration increased from 3 to 4.

^947+^* Each of the Brand/Blessed Orb combination items were adjusted accordingly to better contrast them against Dawnbringer's general all-rounder benefits.

_______________________________________________



=^075 Damage Block Item Changes ^*=

^077Iron Shield^*
^947-^* Chance to block damage against enemy heroes increased from 70% to 80%.

^077Helm of the Black Legion^*
^947-^* Max Health bonus increased from 250 to 270.
^947-^* Health Regeneration per second increased from 6 to 7.
^947-^* Block chance increased from 50% to 60%.

^077Ultor's Heavy Helm^*
^947-^* Max Health bonus increased from 250 to 300.
^947-^* Health Regeneration per second increased from 6 to 8.
^947-^* Block chance increased from 50% to 60%.

^947+^* This line of items has been underperforming in the current meta, so they have been buffed slightly (with care that the meta will not shift to be too favourable for tanky heroes).

_______________________________________________



=^075 Other Item Changes ^*=

^077Armor of the Mad Mage^*
^947-^* Recipe Cost increased from 800 to 1000.
   ^274*^* Total Cost increased from 3200 Gold to 3400 Gold.
^947-^* Activation now dispels debuffs from self.
   ^274*^* Cannot be used while Stunned, Perplexed, or while in a state of being unable to act.
^947-^* Intelligence bonus increased from 18 to 20.
^947-^* Health Regeneration per second increased from 5 to 8.

^947+^* Armor of the Mad Mage's defensive niche was made better on the heroes who can make use of all its aspects (self-purge, negative Magic Armor aura to foes, and Armor for physical survivability).

^077Codex^*
^947-^* Magic Damage for level 1 Codex reduced from 350 to 330.

^947+^* Codex's level 1 price point and amount of damage being offered of the item is the primary point of contention in terms of balancing the item. It is still generally overperforming very slightly, so a small nerf to its damage is warranted.

^077Golden Apple^*
^947-^* Healing amount reduced from 80 Health to 75 Health.
^947-^* Passive Attack Damage bonus reduced from 2 to 1.5.

^077Grave Locket^*
^947-^* Recipe Cost reduced from 200 Gold to 150 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total Cost reduced from 800 Gold to 750 Gold.

^947+^* Grave Locket cost just a tad much for supports to want to pick it up due to their naturally low GPM. This change should help supports consider upgrading Orb of Zamos to Grave Locket a little more often.

^077Insanitarius^*
^947-^* Recipe Cost reduced from 550 Gold to 500 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total Cost reduced from 2750 Gold to 2700 Gold.
^947-^* Attack Damage bonus while active increased from 31 to 32.
^947-^* Health loss per second while active reduced from 45 to 40.

^947+^* Insanitarius has not been frequently seen for a while. Slightly buffing the item should increase its visibility and encourage more Strength heroes to pick up the item for opportunities to outplay their opponents.

^077Mana Potion^*
^947-^* Cost reduced from 50 Gold to 45 Gold.

^077Nome's Wisdom^*
^947-^* Max Shield Health reduced from 300 to 200.

==^960 Bug Fixes & Optimizations ^*==



=^075 General ^*=

^947-^* Repicking a hero in a mode that forces the repick to be random will now exclude your original hero from the available pool of heroes to repick from.
^947-^* Removed/renamed files with entity name collisions. This removes error printouts for name collisions in the console when loading game assets.
^947-^* Rift Beasts set visual effects now appear properly in-game on avatars from the set if you own the whole set.
   ^274*^* Visual effects from owning the entire Rift Beasts set also applies to Rift Devourer and Rift Ravenor, even though they are not part of the Rift Beasts set anymore.



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Circe^*
^947-^* If Twisted Visage is used on Thunderbringer when he recently used Lightning Storm, the ability will now be properly available to use for Circe's mimic.

^059Deadlift^*
^947-^* Onslaught: affected units can now chase the target through fog without directly sighting or revealing the target.
^947-^* Onslaught: the summoned Undead units will no longer run back to Deadlift while Onslaught is active.
   ^274*^* Credits to CarryByKilln for the bug fixes!

^059Emerald Warden^*
^947-^* Gawain no longer blocks neutral camps from respawning.
^947-^* Gawain's Diving Strike's stun (when boosted by Staff of the Master) will no longer pierce through Magic Immunity.

^059Hammerstorm^*
^947-^* F.L.E.X. Hammerstorm and Savior Hammerstorm now play their voice lines properly when using Brute Strength, if Brute Strength was animation-cancelled.



=^075 Items ^*=

^077Orb of Zamos & Grave Locket^*
^947-^* When the penalty for the amount of Gold gained from this item is active, its state will display a charge.

^077Pegasus Boots^*
^947-^* Target is no longer affected by an ally's no-help setting.

^077Restoration Stone^*
^947-^* Now correctly calculates the cooldown without compensating for the item cooldown reduction mechanics of Grimoire of Power or Mystic Illusion Rune.

^077Riftshards^*
^947-^* Fixed a damage calculation bug when damage is increased by a "bonusdamageadd" event.

^980Version 4.9.5^*
-------------
^98016 November 2021^*



==^960 Patch Versioning Change ^*==

From this point onward, the vast majority of hotfix patches will have their patch version (the third number in the patch notes) actually incremented. This is done to ensure that replay compatibility works between patch versions (even hotfix patches).



==^960 Design ^*==



=^075 General ^*=

Experience Changes
^947-^* Assist Experience Penalty changed from 0/0/20/40/60% to 0/0/10/35/60% for 1/2/3/4/5 real ally heroes within the Experience Proximity of the target.

^947+^* This change was made to lessen the experience penalty for a successful gank involving 3 heroes.



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Deadlift^*

^256Onslaught^*
^947-^* Initial radius for creep detection is now increased to 300 plus the cast range of Onslaught.
   ^274*^* This also fixes a bug where the initial radius for creep detection did not increase if Deadlift had Jade Spire in his inventory.

_______________________________________________

^059Thunderbringer^*

^256Lightning Storm^*
^947-^* Can no longer be cast if this ability has been cast within the last 10 seconds.
   ^274*^* Has no realistic effects on regular gameplay, but does affect Lightning Storm's availability if used in conjunction with Restoration Stone.

^947+^* Caster-based items combined with the sheer power of Restoration Stone allows no realistic counterplay against Thunderbringer on a global scope, since their bonuses scale multiplicatively due to their synergy.
^947+^* By allowing more time to elapse between Lightning Storm casts when Restoration Stone is used, Thunderbringer will not be removing every enemy hero's Health as substantially at a moment's notice.

_______________________________________________



=^075 Items ^*=

^077Codex^*
^947-^* Strength bonus reduced from 6/7/8/9/10 to 4/5/6/7/8.
^947-^* Intelligence bonus reduced from 16/18/20/22/24 to 14/16/18/20/22.
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 30/26/24/22/22 seconds to 40/35/30/26/22 seconds.

^077Geometer's Bane^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 60 seconds to 70 seconds.

^077Grimoire of Power^*
^947-^* Active state's Spell Damage increase changed from 30% to 25%.

==^960 Bug Fixes & Optimizations ^*==



=^075 General ^*=

Connectivity Issues
^947-^* Rare connectivity issues immediately after loading the map have been resolved.
^947-^* The game server's tolerance for players with poor internet connection quality is somewhat more lenient.

Illusion Behaviour
^947-^* Illusions that do not inherit orders prior to spawning (i.e., most illusions) now properly have a Stop command issued to them when they spawn.
   ^274*^* This enables these illusions to automatically aggro against enemy units within their aggro range after spawning.

Minimap Ping
^947-^* Added a "Mute Minimap Ping from Voice-Muted Allies" option in Options -> Interface → Gameplay.
   ^274*^* If enabled, then you will not see minimap pings from an voice-muted ally.
   ^274*^* Default setting: enabled.

^947+^* This option was implemented specifically for the use case where players on the same team are communicating through external voice servers and wish to voice-mute their ally in-game to prevent hearing their ally twice.



Added missing role filters for the following heroes:

   ^274*^* Overall, Shard Blast's possible cooldown values are now reduced from 2.4/1.8/1.2 seconds to 2.7/2.1/1.5 seconds with respect to hitting 2 or more enemy heroes 0/1/2 times within the last 10 seconds.

^947-^* Touch radius reduced from 100 to 80.
^947-^* Projectile speed reduced from 2500 to 2200.

^947+^* Adrenaline's play numbers are in a healthy position, though he is outputting a little too much damage at a slightly too frequent rate. These adjustments should resolve those issues.

_______________________________________________

^059Aluna^*

^256Deja Vu^*
^947-^* Mana Cost reduced from 70/80/90/100 to 60/70/80/90.
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 30/28/26/24 seconds to 24/22/20/18 seconds.

^947+^* Aluna has been slightly underperforming on a consistent basis ever since Emerald Lightning had its early Attack Speed drain nerfed.
^947+^* Deja Vu has a long cooldown with an unnecessarily high mana cost for its level of impact, so reducing these values will allow her to use Deja Vu more liberally.

^059Puppet Master^*

^256Voodoo Puppet^*
^947-^* Voodoo Puppet is now unkillable. Upon reaching 0 HP, it will persist for another 1.4/1.8/2.2 seconds and then expire.
   ^274*^* Overflow damage will not be amplified after this point.
   ^274*^* Voodoo Puppet still expires if the affected target moves outside of the leash range.

^947+^* Puppet Master's performance has been low ever since his one-trick burst damage playstyle with Assassin's Shroud into Voodoo Puppet has been discouraged with changes in a past patch.

^947+^* Puppet Master and his teammates can now properly use Voodoo Puppet as a damage and crowd-control proxy, without amplifying excess damage to the foe and encouraging one-shot burst damage builds with Voodoo Puppet.

^947+^* This single change to Voodoo Puppet drastically buffs Puppet Master, as damage-time-on-target is greatly increased without directly amplifying damage dealt to the target.

=^075 Items ^*=

^077Adeve's Cloak^*
^947-^* Recipe cost reduced from 1100 Gold to 900 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total cost reduced from 2300/3400 Gold to 2100/3000 Gold.
^947-^* Max Health bonus reduced from 180/270 to 150/240.
^947-^* Max Mana bonus reduced from 140/180 to 120/160.
^947-^* Damage Reduction while active increased from 15%/40% to 20%/50%.
^947-^* Stun and debuff duration reduction changed from 15%/40% to 20%/50%.

^947+^* Adeve's Cloak receives some number changes to make it more of a viable choice compared to other cost-effective mid-game items that are commonly picked up on heroes that need to protect themselves from burst damage.

^077Barbed Armor^*
^947-^* Recipe Cost increased from 800 Gold to 1100 Gold.
   ^274*^* Total Cost increased from 2200 Gold to 2500 Gold.
^947-^* Cooldown reduced from 40 seconds to 35 seconds.
^947-^* Return Damage from Barbed Armor's active effect now ignores 50% of the damage reduced by Armor and Magic Armor.

^947+^* Barbed Armor has been a little ineffective since its adjustment. This increases the item's viability without bringing back the problems it previously had, while maintaining an appropriate price point for its effects.

^077Ether Jewel^*
^947-^* No longer grants Couriers any amount of Max Mana.

^077Portal Key^*
^947-^* Range reduced from 1200 to 1100.

^947+^* Portal Key's range is being reduced slightly due to the general attack range and cast range changes that have taken place within the last few patches.

^077Ward of Sight and Ward of Revelation^*
^947-^* Usage is now disabled when on a Courier.

==^960 Matchmaking Maps & Modes ^*==



^075Champions of Newerth (CoN)^*

==^960 Bug Fixes & Optimizations ^*==



=^075 General ^*=

^947-^* Dead pixels on certain loading screens have been fixed.
^947-^* Fixed an issue with OpenGL where the game environment would be darkened after certain abilities are cast (e.g. Black Ice Ellonia's Frigid Field).
^947-^* The opposing team can no longer unpause a paused game earlier than expected in certain circumstances.
^947-^* Fixed an issue where voice chat occasionally fails to function in certain games.

Blitz Mode
^947-^* Cooldown reduction no longer stacks with Grimoire of Power or Mystic Illusion Rune.

Hero Behaviour Changes
^947-^* The "Use Courier" ability no longer erroneously plays an animation for the hero when used.
^947-^* Toggling an autocastable ability by right-clicking it no longer breaks your hero's current Hold Position command.
^947-^* The "Use Courier" ability no longer breaks your hero's current Hold Position command.
^947-^* Queued movement orders for a unit will no longer retain terrainwalking-related traits in their pathing when they are lost if no other order is given during that time.

The following abilities will no longer be interrupted if the target teleports into fog:
^947-^* Deadlift's Onslaught
^947-^* Legionnaire's Terrifying Charge
^947-^* Nomad's True Strike
^947-^* Rampage's Stampede
^947-^* Solstice's Blinding Rush and Shadow Dash



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Balphagore^*
^947-^* Hell on Newerth (when boosted by Staff of the Master) now properly deals a maximum of 400/550/700 Magic Damage.
   ^274*^* Tooltip said a max of 500/750/900 Magic Damage, but the in-game values were actually the same as its unboosted values (300/450/600 Magic Damage).
   ^274*^* Regardless, the numbers have been changed to be correct.

^059Berzerker^*
^947-^* Chain Spike is now properly detected by certain sources (e.g. Mana Battery, Power Supply) on the initial cast of the ability.

^059Corrupted Disciple^*
^947-^* Loki (HD) avatar model is now correct in the HoN Store.

^059Dampeer^*
^947-^* Count Dampeer will no longer be immune to Puppet Show's effects when Consume is at max charges.

^059Forsaken Archer^*
^947-^* Santa's Little Archer attack sound effects are now synchronized properly with her visual attack timings.

^059Flux^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master's effects now properly apply to Cyborg Flux's Discharge in push mode.
^947-^* Magnetic Surge no longer causes Flux to stutter when aggroed against an invalid enemy target.

^059Gladiator^*
^947-^* No longer plays the whip attack animation when attacking structures.
   ^274*^* Credits to Gimji for the fixes!

^059Goldenveil^*
^947-^* Homecoming Stone, Post Haste, and Pegasus Boots now expire the Perch state on Goldenveil if it is active.

^059Grinex^*
^947-^* Songkran Grinex now shows its full water effects on its tentacles.
^947-^* Lynn X avatar now uses her own voice lines (instead of the default Grinex avatar's voice lines).
   ^274*^* Credits to Gimji for the fixes!

^059Ichor^*
^947-^* Saint's Blood now properly applies its damage reduction when Bloodrush is learned.

^059King Klout^*
^947-^* Conscription's hex effect is no longer restricted by the cooldown on the ability (only the minion upgrade effect is affected by the cooldown).

^059Kraken^*
^947-^* Killer Kraken's voiceovers are now correct when casting Release the Kraken!

^059Myrmidon^*
^947-^* Default avatar's Forced Evolution form's attack animations have been fixed.
   ^274*^* Credits to Gimji for the fixes!

^059Parasite^*
^947-^* Circe will no longer be able to permanently control an Infested creep if Circe's Twisted Visage on Parasite expires on the same frame that the projectile spawns from her Parasite Mimic.
^947-^* When attempted to Infest a creep that has already been Infested (e.g. interactions with Circe's mimic), the Infest state on the creep will be dispelled, causing the Infested creep to die and kicking out its host.
   ^274*^* Previously, the most recent Infest source would have control of the Infested creep, and all previous hosts would be unable to escape from the creep or do anything until the creep dies.

^059Pharaoh^*
^947-^* Wrath of the Pharaoh no longer considers Couriers as valid potential targets.

^059Predator^*
^947-^* Terror no longer has a Physical effect type check. This allows attacks enhanced by Harkon's Blade against a Physically immune unit to properly apply Terror.

^059Prisoner^*
^947-^* The affected enemy unit will now always have sight of the Shackled gadget.

^059Puppet Master^*
^947-^* Voodoo Puppet no longer plays a sound every frame if a DoT effect is active on it.



=^075 Items ^*=

^947-^* Items in consumable slots will now drop properly if the "Drop Items" game option is enabled.

^077Lightbrand, Frozen Light, Searing Light, and Dawnbringer^*
^947-^* DoT state is now properly transferred by certain abilities (e.g. Parasite's Facehug).

^077Ophelia's Pact^*
^947-^* Now outputs chat messages to the player as objectives are being completed.
   ^274*^* This keeps a record of the current quest progress, which is difficult to feasibly keep track of on the Ophelia's Pact quest state tooltip.

^077Pegasus Boots^*
^947-^* The user can no longer target themselves with Pegasus Boots' activation.

^077Ward of Sight & Ward of Revelation^*
^947-^* Wards with the Lookout Ward skin now properly trigger the quests for Ophelia's Pact in the proper scenarios.

==^960 Design ^*==



=^075 Staff of the Master & Master's Legacy Changes ^*=

^059King Klout^*

   ^274*^* Spawn rate per goblin changed from 2 seconds to 3 seconds.

_______________________________________________



=^075 In-Game HUD ^*=

If an ally player is either voice-muted or on your ignore list, then you will not see minimap pings from them.



=^075 General ^*=

Mystic Illusion Rune
^947-^* Cooldown reduction now only applies to Abilities (i.e. not items).



=^075 Heroes ^*=

^059Adrenaline^*

^256Shard Blast^*
^947-^* Base cooldown reduced from 3 seconds to 2.4 seconds.
^947-^* When 2 or more enemy heroes are hit, cooldown is now reduced by 0.6 seconds (instead of 0.75 seconds).
   ^274*^* Overall, Shard Blast's possible cooldown values are now reduced from 3/2.25/1.5 seconds to 2.4/1.8/1.2 seconds with respect to hitting 2 or more enemy heroes 0/1/2 times within the last 10 seconds.

^256Death's Halo^*
^947-^* Now also grants 5 Attack Speed per real hero inside Death's Halo (still 2x the value for enemy heroes).

_______________________________________________

^059Artillery^*

^256LRM^*
^947-^* Percentage of Attack Damage bonus on each LRM rocket increased from 7/12/17/22% to 7/13/19/25%.

_______________________________________________

^059Empath^*

^256As One^*
^947-^* While active, bonus Mana Regeneration per second for self reduced from 2/3/4 to 1.

_______________________________________________

^059Engineer^*
^947-^* Attack Range increased from 500 to 550.

_______________________________________________

^059Fayde^*
^947-^* Base Attack Damage reduced from 48-54 to 46-52.

^256Reflection^*
^947-^* Movement Speed bonus reduced from 20% to 15%.

_______________________________________________

^059Glacius^*

^256Ice Imprisonment^*
^947-^* Magic Damage per second reduced from 90 to 85.

^256Chilling Presence^*
^947-^* Bonus Mana Regeneration for self reduced from 1.5 to 1.

_______________________________________________

^059Ichor^*
^947-^* Strength growth per level reduced from 2.6 to 2.4.

^256Life Leech^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 12 seconds to 14 seconds.
^947-^* Percentage of missing Health healed (when dealing non-DoT damage to the affected target) changed from 1.5/2/2.5/3% to 2%.
^947-^* Now applies a 1.2 second Life Leech Limiter state to the attacker if they do not have one active.
   ^274*^* Attackers with the Life Leech Limiter state receive 0.5x healing from Life Leech.

^256Transfusion^*
^947-^* Damage transfer from the affected ally unit increased from 20% to 30%.

^256Saint's Blood^*
^947-^* No longer grants a base 4/6/8/10% Damage Reduction.
   ^274*^* Max Damage Reduction reduced from 20/30/40/50% to 16/24/32/40%.

^256Bloodrush^*
^947-^* Duration increased from 7 seconds to 8 seconds.
^947-^* Radius reduced from 600 to 500 units.
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 100/80/60 seconds to 100/90/80 seconds.
^947-^* True Damage per second to enemies reduced from 30/35/40 to 25/30/35.
^947-^* Base Heal per second reduced from 20/30/40 to 15.
^947-^* Healing increase multiplier for Bloodrush procs per enemy hero hit reduced from +0.5x to +0.4x.
   ^274*^* Max extra heal multiplier from Bloodrush reduced from +1.0x to +0.8x.
^947-^* Bloodrush no longer has a 1x base heal multiplier on allies affected with Transfusion.

^947+^* Ichor's resilience and healing was a little too self-sufficient (particularly with Life Leech and Bloodrush, combined with Sacrificial Stone), so his numbers have been adjusted to address this.
^947+^* He will also absorb slightly more damage for his allies with Transfusion, while still maintaining a distinct functionality difference from Monarch's Chrysalis.
^947+^* Despite these changes, Ichor still proves to be an incredibly powerful hero and healer.

_______________________________________________

^059King Klout^*

^256Goblin Toss^*
^947-^* Spawn rate per goblin changed from 8 seconds to 6 seconds.
^947-^* Red and Green minions no longer apply their initial burst of Magic Damage in an area, and will only affect the target they directly hit.
   ^274*^* In other words, only the Magic Damage over Time (DoT) and Movement Speed Slow effect are applied in an area.
^947-^* The Magic DoT effect now stacks up to 5 times.

^256Conscription^*
^947-^* Now has a 2.5 second cooldown only for upgrading minions upon triggering Conscription on an enemy unit.

^947+^* King Klout's initial burst of area Magic Damage on the Red and Green minions resulted in too much unintentional burst damage in teamfights and farming rotations. The area effect for the burst of Magic Damage was removed to address these issues.
^947+^* To slightly compensate for this damage loss, the Magic DoT effect now stacks.
^947+^* King Klout was mass upgrading minions with Conscription's "hidden" mechanic coupled with Bluster, which is a 100% unintentional side effect from the original designer of the hero. The minion upgrading effect now takes place over a realistic amount of time, instead of it happening for many of his minions at once whenever King Klout is farming creeps.

_______________________________________________

^059Lord Salforis^*

^256The Undying^*
^947-^* State is no longer transferrable (e.g. by Ichor's Transfusion).

_______________________________________________

^059Monarch^*

^256Chrysalis^*
^947-^* Damage Reduction on the affected ally increased from 30/40/50/60% to 35/45/55/65%.

^947+^* This change is necessary to further differentiate the damage reduction between Monarch and Ichor, as Ichor's damage transfer comes with very little downsides to the affected ally unit.

_______________________________________________

^059Monkey King^*
^947-^* Base Armor reduced from 3.2 to 2.8.
^947-^* Strength growth per level reduced from 2 to 1.9.

_______________________________________________

^059Pearl^*

^256Soothing Presence^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 20 seconds to 25 seconds.
^947-^* No longer has a cast time.
^947-^* Now breaks channeling when cast.

_______________________________________________

^059Rhapsody^*

^256Arcane Hymn^*
^947-^* Healing output bonus reduced from 15/20/25/30% to 8/12/16/20%.

_______________________________________________

^059Shadowblade^*
^947-^* Strength, Agility and Intelligence growth per level reduced from 2.5 to 2.2.

_______________________________________________

^059Sir Benzington^*

^256Heart Piercer^*
^947-^* Magic Armor penetration now applies for all sources of Magic Damage dealt (rather than just Ability Damage).
   ^274*^* The tooltip was previously misleading, so the Magic Armor penetration mechanic has been adjusted accordingly.

_______________________________________________

^059Thunderbringer^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 450 to 400.
^947-^* Base Movement Speed reduced from 310 to 300.

^256Chain Lightning^*
^947-^* Cooldown increased from 1.5 seconds to 1.75 seconds.

^256Blast of Lightning^*
^947-^* Cast Range reduced from 800 to 700.
^947-^* Magic Damage reduced from 125/200/275/350 to 115/190/265/340.
^947-^* Mana Cost changed from 75/95/115/135 to 90/105/120/135.

^256Lightning Rod^*
^947-^* Distance for dealing 0.5x damage with Lightning Rod increased from 1000 units to 1100 units (to account for Jade Spire).
^947-^* Now properly deals 0.5x damage to enemies farther than 1100 units from Thunderbringer.
   ^274*^* This is technically a bugfix, but it affects his balance with regards to Lightning Storm in many situations.

^947+^* Thunderbringer's numbers were a little overtuned (particularly the mana cost to damage ratio on Blast of Lightning), so he should be well balanced after these changes and the bugfix to his Lightning Rod.

_______________________________________________

^059Tundra^*

^256Call of Winter^*
^947-^* Shiver's immunity type changed from Gadget Immunity to Indirect Immunity.
   ^274*^* This means that non-DoT, non-Cleave damage can now kill Shiver in 1 hit.

_______________________________________________

^077Lightbrand^*

   ^274*^* Bottle

   ^274*^* Monkey King's Flying Nimbus
   ^274*^* Nymphora's Grace of the Nymph
   ^274*^* Pegasus Boots' retention of charges
   ^274*^* Pestilence's Flight second activation (while Flight is active)
   ^274*^* Portal Key
   ^274*^* Post Haste's retention of charges
   ^274*^* Regeneration Rune and Ioyn Stone's Regeneration state
   ^274*^* Rejuvenation Potion
   ^274*^* Soultrap state on allies
   ^274*^* Striders' retention of charges
   ^274*^* Tempest's Meteor

AFK Detection
^947-^* Non-hero units you control that are moving outside of your base will no longer reset your AFK timer.
^947-^* Attacking item chests on the ground will no longer reset your AFK timer.

^947-^* HoNiversary events will take place from May 25, 2021 to June 30, 2021.

_______________________________________________

^059Fayde^*

^256Reflection^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect addition (new):
   ^274*^* Reflection's first on-attack effects is preserved for 5 seconds if Reflection expires without applying the effect.
   ^274*^* After using Reflection, the ability becomes Umbral Dance.
   ^274*^* Umbral Dance has 3 charges. 1 charge of Umbral Dance is lost when the Reflection state expires.
   ^274*^* Target an enemy to consume a charge and teleport to them through the shadows, applying Shadow Walk to yourself for 1 second and applies 0.6x of the original DoT effect to the target (does not stack with the original DoT or itself).
   ^274*^* Also refreshes the timer on Umbral Dance.
   ^274*^* Range: 700

^947+^* This Staff of the Master effect allows Fayde more freedom in her ability usage sequence and timings, while simultaneously granting her unique defensive properties after unloading her burst damage on her main target.
^947+^* Credits to Hubaris for the Staff of the Master effect suggestion!

_______________________________________________

^059Kane^*

^256Face Off^*
^947-^* Staff of the Master effect changes (to pre-existing):
   ^274*^* Kane now also gains 50% Damage Reduction against damage sources other than the target.
   ^274*^* Charges for the bonus Attack Damage effect are now stored retroactively.
   ^274*^* However, the Attack Damage gained this way has been reduced from 8/12/16 to 4/6/8 per charge.
   ^274*^* No longer grants an opponent bonus Attack Damage if they win the Face Off.

^947+^* Kane's Staff of the Master now has an effect that is more one-sided in his favour.

_______________________________________________

^059King Klout^*

^256Goblin Toss^*

=^075 Ranked Pick ^*=

^947-^* Max number of hero bans that can take place at the end of the banning phase increased from 6 to 8.

=^075 General ^*=

^947-^* Assist time threshold changed from 10 seconds to 12 seconds.
^947-^* HoN Live has been disabled, as it is now considered a deprecated feature (i.e. does not work since a few years ago).

_______________________________________________



=^075 Forests of Caldavar (general) ^*=

^947-^* Base Hero Kill Gold Bounty increased from 200 to 230.



=^075 Forests of Caldavar ("New") ^*=

^947-^* Hero Kill Gold Bounty per killed hero's level increased from 5 to 10.
^947-^* Base Hero Kill Experience Bounty linearly (non-cumulatively) increased by 15 for each level of the killed hero.

^947+^* These changes (coupled with the general Hero Kill Bounty change to Forests of Caldavar) should allow solo heroes (particularly solo heroes that are in the middle lane) to have more impact on the game overall.

^947-^* Kongor: while invulnerable at the start of the game, Kongor is also visually hidden.
   ^274*^* A visual timer for Kongor now spawns when the game time initially reaches 0:00.

^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 600 to 550.

^059Thunderbringer^*
^947-^* Attack Range increased from 350 to 450.

^059Torturer^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 600 to 550.

^059Valkyrie^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 600 to 550.

^059Vindicator^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 600 to 550.

^059Voodoo Jester^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 600 to 575.

^059Wretched Hag^*
^947-^* Attack Range reduced from 550 to 525.

^947+^* Attack Range has not been leveraged much as a measure of balance. In the past, 600 Attack Range has been a standardized attack range for most ranged heroes - if the hero did not have at least 600 Attack Range, they are considered suboptimal for lane performance.
^947+^* To break away from this standardized Attack Range, many ranged heroes have had their Attack Range readjusted appropriately.
^947+^* Attack Range reductions have many factors contributing to them, with some of the heavier factors being overloaded kits and having long range harass tools/already being good in the laning phase.
^947+^* Generally speaking, 550 Attack Range is the new standard for most ranged carry heroes, while primary support heroes will generally have 600 Attack Range. There are some exceptions due to a hero's overall performance (and due to the factors mentioned above).

^947+^* Overall, the changes to the Attack Ranges will enable more interactions in the laning phase and throughout the game (since ranged heroes generally have to get closer to creeps and enemy heroes to hit them).
^947+^* The Cast Ranges of abilities and items can be adjusted in the future after seeing how the changes in this patch affect the meta. Furthermore, these changes are a small indirect buff to melee heroes in general.

_______________________________________________

^059Ichor^*

^256Life Leech^*
^947-^* Visual indicator on enemy targets have been improved to be more distinguishable (so that allies are more incentivized to hit that enemy to heal themselves).
^947-^* Percentage of missing Health healed (when dealing non-DoT damage to the affected target) changed from 2% to 1.5/2/2.5/3%.
^947-^* Magic Damage dealt changed from 90/130/165/200 to 100/150/170/190.

^256Transfusion^*
^947-^* Damage transfer from the ally unit reduced from 30/40/50/60% to 20%.
^947-^* Cooldown changed from 26/22/18/14 seconds to 20/18/16/14 seconds.
^947-^* Magic Damage changed from 90/140/190/240 to 100/150/200/240.

^256Saint's Blood^*
^947-^* Base Damage Reduction against Physical and Magic damage changed from 3/6/9/12% to 4/6/8/10%.
^947-^* Bonus Damage Reduction per debuff reduced from 8/9/10/11% to 4/6/8/10%.
^947-^* Max Damage Reduction from Saint's Blood reduced from 25/35/45/55% to 20/30/40/50%.
   ^274*^* Max Damage Reduction is now obtained by having 4 debuffs on Ichor (rather than 3/4/4/5 debuffs with efficiency loss on the final debuff).

^947-^* When Bloodrush is learned, Saint's Blood gains an active effect.
^947-^* Target another ally hero to apply Ichoric Blood to them indefinitely, only expiring if they die or if Ichoric Blood is transferred to another ally hero.
^947-^* While within 1200 radius of Ichor, damage dealt by Ichor's autoattacks and non-ultimate abilities to enemy heroes heal the ally with Ichoric Blood for 10/15/20 Health.
   ^274*^* This effect is based on the level of Bloodrush.
   ^274*^* Range: 800
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 1 second

^075Ability 4: Bloodrush (Reworked)^*
   ^274*^* Radius: 600
   ^274*^* Mana Cost: 120/160/200
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 100/80/60 seconds

^947-^* Activate to create an aura of blood around yourself for 7 seconds.
^947-^* While the aura is active, Allies within the area gain 20 Attack Speed, plus an additional 10/15/20 Attack Speed per Ally Hero in radius.
^947-^* Enemies within the area also receive 30/35/40 True Damage every second.
^947-^* Whenever Bloodrush deals damage to an enemy hero, it heals Ichor and ally heroes affected by Ichoric Blood or Transfusion within 1200 radius for 20/30/40 + 1/1.5/2% of Ichor's Max Health.
   ^274*^* This effect can be amplified further by 0.5x for each enemy hero hit after the first (max of +1.0x).
   ^274*^* Other ally heroes within the radius of Bloodrush that are not affected by Ichoric Blood or Transfusion get healed for 0.5x this amount.

^947+^* Most heroes in the game have one-time burst heals, and most heals do not scale as the game progresses. The existing spammable sustained heals (Soul Reaper, Demented Shaman) heal for a small amount of static Health.
^947+^* The aim of the Ichor rework is to transition him away from granting allies a large amount of Damage Reduction (that is Monarch's role) and to transition him to having sustained, scalable healing in teamfights that scales as the game progresses.
^947+^* This playstyle makes Ichor a proactive support hero with high durability that is encouraged to rush into the front lines of a teamfight, damaging as many enemy heroes as possible to sustain his team's Health.
^947+^* His new Bloodrush ability also encourages his team to have at least 1 other frontline hero to take advantage of the healing around Ichor.
^947+^* Transfusion still serves as a powerful mobility tool, as well as a constant debuff transfer tool for protecting allies.

_______________________________________________

^059King Klout^*

^256Goblin Toss^*
^947-^* Red minion: base Magic Damage increased from 30/40/50/60 to 70/90/110/130 (same as Blue minion), Magic Damage over time reduced from 55/70/85/100 to 15/20/25/30.
   ^274*^* Total damage taken over time remains unchanged.
   ^274*^* Green's minion also inherits Red minion's effects.

^947+^* This adjustment was made to accommodate King Klout's new Staff of the Master effect with Goblin Toss.

^059Pearl^*

^256Whirlbubble^*

^256Soothing Presence (Reworked)^*
   ^274*^* Radius: 600
   ^274*^* Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 20 seconds
^947-^* Passively grants 0.8/1.2/1.6/2 Health Regeneration per second to nearby ally heroes for each nearby allied hero.
   ^274*^* Passive effect is disabled while the ability is on cooldown.
^947-^* Activate to immediately heal all nearby allies for 100/150/200/250 Health, but lose the passive Health Regeneration aura effect for the cooldown.

^256Bubble Pop! (Subability of Soothing Presence)^*
   ^274*^* Range: 600
   ^274*^* Mana Cost: 50
   ^274*^* Cooldown: 35/30/25/20 seconds
^947-^* Target a location to travel there by using bubble momentum.
   ^274*^* Pearl takes 0.75 seconds to reach target destination.
   ^274*^* Default hotkey of this ability: "D".

^947+^* Pearl gets her old Soothing Presence ability back, while still getting a leap to initiate/escape as a support hero (although on a much longer cooldown, with no bonus effects).
^947+^* The separation of the healing effect from the leap effect is necessary for Pearl to maintain her defensive role, while still having enough offense to pose a threat to enemy teams with her Bubble Pop to Preservation initiation combo.
^947+^* Yes, Pearl will be viable in Mid Wars again with these changes.

^059Prophet^*

   ^274*^* Can still be double-activated to cast the heal on yourself, propagating the heal effect to the closest ally hero within 800 radius.

^947+^* This change was made to make Prophet viable for higher level play, while still keeping the overall smoothness of his ability usage flow if he does not wish to target a specific ally hero.
